---
name: Config change
about: Changes to opencode.json, env vars, or MCP server setup
labels: config
---

## Scope
- [ ] opencode.json / opencode.jsonc
- [ ] Environment variables
- [ ] MCP server configuration
- [ ] GitHub Actions / CI
- [ ] Other

## Current behavior
What the config currently does (or is missing).

## Desired behavior
What it should do after the change.

## Backward compatibility
- [ ] Breaking change (existing setups will break)
- [ ] Non-breaking (backward compatible)

## Checklist
- [ ] Updated relevant documentation
- [ ] Tested with `QUIET=1` (no noisy startup)
- [ ] Follows existing naming conventions
